production.playableLoop: Steer the diver through the sunken archive, collect three relic tablets, avoid patrolling eel hazards, and return to the air bell before oxygen runs out.
production.objective: Collect Relics 3/3, then reach the air bell with oxygen remaining.
production.failRetry: Eel contact or oxygen timeout fails the dive; Space resets diver, relics, and oxygen.

catalogSearches: tn asset source search --game-category character --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --game-category environment --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH

tn asset source search --game-category water --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --game-category ocean --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH

tn asset source search --game-category space --format glb --direct-only --json -> direct Objaverse robot/ship/probe records, not cohesive underwater archive kit
assetProvenance.fallback: Direct catalog did not provide a cohesive runtime-ready underwater archive kit. Diver, eel hazards, relic tablets, ruins, air bell, kelp, bubbles, and HUD are authored as a cohesive procedural mesh kit.
